prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为9385→10589→14006→15950→15775名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约6390名；2025年基准位次约15775名，较2024年略 有回升（前移175名），但仍处于近年高位区间；该校在河北省物理类招生计划：2021年187人、2022年189人、2023年185人、2024年185人、2025年199人；2026 年计划207人，较2025年扩招8人（增幅约4.0%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字倾向于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主 榜排名：2021年第36名→2022年第39名→2023年第38名→2024年第39名→2025年第37名→2026年第38名，近年稳定在36–39名区间，属于中上游985层次；2025年高考 周期声誉评价为偏负面（实习安全事故），2026年周期转为中性/混合（校区争议），整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档 记录；第五轮学科评估：控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科；计算机类 、自动化类、电子信息类等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对物理类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；河 北省2026年高考总人数约609800人（较2025年606754人略增约3000人），物理类按历史占比约59.8%估算约364660人，考生规模小幅扩大；省控线2025年物理类本科批459分、特殊 类型499分，近年呈上升趋势，反映竞争加剧；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，属东北地区；河北省考生对东北地区高校存在一定地域偏好差异，但作为985高校仍 具吸引力；该校在河北省招生规模较大（物理类200人左右），属跨省招生重点省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15775名、2026年扩招约4.0%使位次后移、考生总数小 幅增加、优势学科吸引力强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次约16185名，较2025年小幅后移约410名；位次区间15685–16685名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 9385 → 10589 → 14006 → 15950 → 15775, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6390 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15775, slightly higher (forward shift of 175 positions) compared to 2024, but still in the high range of recent years; the enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province for Physics Category: 187 in 2021, 189 in 2022, 185 in 2023, 185 in 2024, 199 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 207, an increase of 8 students (about 4.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking: 36th in 2021 → 39th in 2022 → 38th in 2023 → 39th in 2024 → 37th in 2025 → 38th in 2026, stable in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was somewhat negative (internship safety incident), turning neutral/mixed (campus controversy) in the 2026 cycle, with overall limited impact; Douyin popularity ranking 82nd, rated as average, with low short video exposure; no obvious record of admission cut-off breaks; fifth round discipline evaluation: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 disciplines rated A- or above; enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information are highly matched with advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Hebei Province is about 609,800 (slightly increased by about 3,000 from 606,754 in 2025), with Physics Category estimated at about 364,660 based on a historical proportion of about 59.8%, showing a slight expansion in candidate scale; the provincial control line for 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 459 points, special type 499 points, showing an upward trend in recent years, reflecting intensified competition; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region; candidates from Hebei Province have certain regional preference differences for universities in the Northeast, but as a 985 university, it still has appeal; the university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei Province (about 200 in Physics Category), making it a key province for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 15775, the approximately 4.0% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing a backward shift in ranking, a slight increase in total candidate numbers, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 16185, a slight backward shift of about 410 positions compared to 2025; the ranking range is 15685–16685.

- Automation Class
- Electronic Information Class.

- Robotics Engineering

- Architecture Class

- Bioengineering Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 15685–16685, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15685), focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 16685), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1640 → 1931 → 2787 → 2531 → 2528, showing an overall backward trend, peaking at 2787 in 2023 before slightly moving forward; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2528, basically unchanged from 2531 in 2024; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province: 27 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, a reduction of 2 from 2025 (a decrease of about 5.7%), which slightly eases competition, with ranking numbers tending to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on Soft Science has been stable in the 36–39 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to a safety incident during internships), while in the 2026 cycle it is neutral/mixed (due to campus disputes), with overall limited impact; its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with average reviews; Northeastern University is primarily engineering-focused, and its History Category majors (Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literatures) lack direct support from A- or higher disciplines, with no obvious advantages in discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively popular, teacher training/education is divided and wait-and-see, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province, estimated at about 40.2% of the total, is approximately 245,140, a slight increase from 243,714 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category in 2025 is 477 for the undergraduate batch and 527 for special types, showing an upward trend in recent years; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, and examinees from Hebei Province have certain regional preference differences towards universities in Northeast China; the enrollment scale for History Category is relatively small (about 33), making the competition pattern relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2528, the approximately 5.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 causing the ranking to move forward, a slight increase in the total number of examinees, and relatively weak discipline evaluation support for History Category majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2421, moving forward by about 107 places compared to 2025; the ranking range is 2058–2784.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 2058–2784, and only 3 majors in History Category, it is recommended to focus on Public Administration as the main choice, aim for the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as a reach, and use Foreign Languages and Literatures as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2058), focus on aiming for the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2784), use Foreign Languages and Literatures as a safety.
